page_metadata.biotools__summary: DDIMDL is a multimodal deep learning framework for predicting drug-drug interaction events. DDIMDL builds multimodal deep learning framework with multiple features of drugs to predict drug-drug-interaction (DDI) events.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DDIMDL is a multimodal deep learning framework for predicting drug-drug interaction events. DDIMDL builds multimodal deep learning framework with multiple features of drugs to predict drug-drug-interaction (DDI) events.
